title: gomphocarpus fruticosus subsp. setosus
intro: Gomphocarpus fruticosus subsp. setosus, commonly known as the thorny balloon plant, is a perennial plant species in the milkweed family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Gomphocarpus fruticosus subsp. setosus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, as well as having potential antitumor and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its seeds can be used as a source of mucilage for various herbal preparations.
